title: podman-play-kube template: rename to podman-kube
body:
With the upcoming plans of introducing a podman-kube command with
various subcommands, rename the podman-play-kube systemd template
to podman-kube before releasing it.

Also mention it in the docs.  No release notes needed as the template has
already been covered by the commit it was introduced with.

```release-note
None
```
